auth.checkEmailDescription: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Click the link to access your assessment.
auth.verifyDescription: A sign-in link has been sent to your email address. Click the link to continue.
auth.unauthorizedDescription: You don't have permission to access this page.

assessment.title: Skills Assessment
assessment.inviteTitle: You have been invited to complete a professional skills assessment.

instructions.quietPlace: Find a quiet place with a stable internet connection
instructions.duration: The assessment will take approximately 30–45 minutes
instructions.noBackNavigation: You cannot go back to previous questions once submitted
instructions.autoSave: Your progress is auto-saved every 30 seconds
instructions.emailReport: You will receive your report by email upon completion

assessment.magicLinkHint: You'll receive a magic link to verify your email.
assessment.rankInstruction: Drag or use arrows to rank items from most important (top) to least important (bottom).

complete.title: Assessment Complete
complete.description: Thank you for completing the assessment. Your responses have been recorded and are being analyzed.
complete.reportEmail: You will receive an email with your detailed results shortly.

report.title: Skills Assessment Report
report.integrityNotice: This assessment has been flagged for manual review.
